channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mortgage rates edge lower, hover near 6%
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage slipped this week to 6.09%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is down from...

item.title: Crypto lender BlockFills suspends withdrawals for clients in latest blow to the blockchain sector
item.description: During the digital assets crash of 2022, lenders made similarly protective moves.

item.title: One of Wall Street’s most feared hedge fund managers on the decline of the dollar: gold is ‘becoming the reserve asset’
item.description: Greenlight Capital's David Einhorn, known for his “Einhorn Effect” and years of touting gold, says the world's central banks don't love dollars anymor...

item.title: Gun accessory maker to pay $1.75M to Buffalo mass shooting victims’ families
item.description: A Georgia gun accessory maker will pay $1.75 million to victims' families of the 2022 Buffalo mass shooting and halt New York sales of its MA Lock dev...

item.title: HHS Casts Doubts On mRNA Products, But Funds Studies On Debunked Theories
item.description: It's conspicuous that HHS refuses to review Moderna's application for regulatory approval of an mRNA-based flu vaccine while it prioritizes research o...

item.title: OpenClaw is the bad boy of AI agents. Here’s why security experts say you should beware
item.description: The open-source AI agent pushes autonomy to the edge — thrilling hobbyists and unnerving security experts

item.title: Billionaire founder of Minecraft slams anyone advocating using AI to write code as ‘incompetent or evil’
item.description: Minecraft creator Markus Persson has just issued a warning: That AI is “being forced down our throats” and that leaders behind the push are “evil.”

item.title: Four Consequences Of Revoking The Endangerment And Vehicle Rules
item.description: Revoking the Endangerment Finding will increase pollution, raise fuel costs, weaken U.S. competitiveness, and trigger legal chaos—costing lives, jobs,...

item.title: Apple iOS 26.3 New iPhone Software: Should You Upgrade?
item.description: The latest iPhone update is out. So, should you get it or not?

item.title: Aqua Security Goes All In On Runtime Protection
item.description: Aqua Security's CEO Mike Dube explains why the 11-year-old company is going back to its roots with a laser focus on runtime protection instead of chas...

item.title: These Are The 27 EVs That Cost Less Than The Average New Vehicle
item.description: Think all full-electric cars and SUVs are priced beyond reach? Think again. Many now cost less than $30,000.

item.title: Instagram boss reveals he’s paid $900k per year plus stock worth ‘tens of millions of dollars’ as he denies ‘addiction’ claims
item.description: The plaintiff’s lawyer in a landmark social media addiction trial tried to connect Adam Mosseri’s compensation with Instagram’s policy toward filters.

item.title: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq all end sharply lower as AI fears bleed beyond tech stocks
The S&P 500 is on the verge of turning negative for the year — live updates
Senior AI staffers keep quitting — and are issuing warnings
Selloff moves beyond tech as investors sell first, ask questions later on AI
Dow stuck below 50,000 in final hour, S&P 500 and Nasdaq down sharply — live
FAA lifts El Paso flight restriction after US disables Mexican cartel drones that 'breached US airspace'
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration walked back an order grounding all flights to and from the El Paso International Airport on Wednesday.

item.title: US economy added 130K jobs in January, delayed report shows
item.description: The U.S. economy added jobs at a steady pace to start the year, as the Labor Department reported that employers hired 130,000 workers in January 2026,...

item.title: Expert credits Trump tax certainty for economic confidence, Americans returning to workforce
item.description: The American workforce rebounds with unexpected job gains in January, signaling economic momentum as labor participation rises across demographics nat...

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
